# Install

## Git UPM
Add this package to Unity `Packages/manifest.json`:

```json
{
  "dependencies": {
    "com.codexsix.uikit.runtime": "https://github.com/<your-org>/codexsix-uikit-runtime.git#v0.1.0"
  }
}
```

## Requirements
- Unity `6000.3`+
- `com.unity.inputsystem`

## Optional
Import sample from Package Manager:
- `Mock Arena UI`
